title: polygala fruticosa
intro: Polygala fruticosa, also known as False Asphodel, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Polygala fruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
